MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Martin S. Schenker, Esq. of Cooley LLP, Tel. 415.693.2154, appearing for cross defendant and moving party;
Timothy Scott, Esq. of King & Spalding LLP, Tel. 650.590.0700, appearing for plaintiff Dolby;
Anne-Marie D. Dao, Esq. of Miclean Gleason LLP, Tel. 650.684.1181, appearing for defendant and opposing party.

The matter was argued.
